_comment: All four fields here are fallback values only, used when the corresponding live scrape in fetch_data.py fails for that run — refresh them occasionally so the fallback doesn't go stale, but they are not the primary source. aaii_sentiment specifically: aaii.com has previously blocked scrapers outright (Cloudflare); if that recurs, update this by hand weekly from https://www.aaii.com/sentimentsurvey (released Thursdays).
